flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Nebraska Community College rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $4.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Western Nebraska Community College rose 29% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.0k → $9.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Nebraska Community College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Western Nebraska Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (59.6% → 52.8%).
